Derek,

Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies would like nothing better than to defeat Tim on the way to a 60-seat Republican supermajority that would allow them to pass Donald Trump's agenda. As we speak, they're building a campaign war chest aimed at electing someone to rubber stamp their entire agenda.

What we need to do is make sure that Tim has the resources to fight back in what is likely to be one of the most expensive races this cycle. In 2012, we were the #1 target of outside spending in the country!

We're making progress on our $60,000 end-of-month goal, but with **LESS THAN TWO DAYS LEFT** in May, we still have a ways to go. **[Pitch in whatever you can to help us hit our goal!](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=icU3kPyAew7%2Blq9SDHSCHWd2vx4JKFE8)**

Virginians need Tim as an advocate for our core values in the U.S. Senate, including economic opportunity for all, access to a great education for our children, and preserving essential programs like Social Security and Medicare.

Tim's always going to fight for Virginians, but he needs you to stand with him now more than ever. **[Chip in to re-elect Tim and keep the GOP from getting a 60-seat supermajority.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9sR2sg7YlrevJxchFs9sgGd2vx4JKFE8)**

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: why we email
body:
#
Team --
Our end of month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and you may be wondering why that matters for a campaign without an election for another 15 months.
Florida is one of the most expensive states in the nation to run a campaign in -- and it's no wonder, considering that we're the nation's third-most populous state. For politicians like Governor Rick Scott, and others who are independently wealthy, that's nothing to be concerned about -- they just write themselves big check after big check. Rick Scott, for example, spent $75 million of his own money in his first campaign for Florida Governor.
You know my story. I'm the son of a construction worker and a bus driver, and have worked in public service for my entire career thus far. So we're doing this a different way.
[**We 're crowdfunding this campaign from folks like you who believe in our message, our mission, and our movement. Chip in right here, right now, to help us reach our end of month fundraising goal before the deadline >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3338/9e00690/4bcd62ca/24037139/2487802890/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170530-eom")
So far, we've received over 6,000 individual contributions online, the vast majority of which are from people who gave less than $100. This method might take a little more time when it comes to raising the resources we'll need to win, but it's well worth it to run a scrappy, people-powered campaign.
This is an incredible accomplishment -- but we're going to need to keep up the momentum if we're going to win this race. And that's why we're asking, and we need to know now:
[**Will you chip in to our campaign before our end of month deadline, and help us crowdfund the resources we need to win?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3338/9e00690/4bcd62ca/24037139/2487802890/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170530-eom")
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Bring it home, Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3338/9e00690/4bcd62ca/24037139/2487802890/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170530-eom")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3338/9e00690/4bcd62ca/24037138/2487802890/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3338/9e00690/4bcd62ca/2403713b/2487802890/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3338/9e00690/4bcd62ca/2403713a/2487802890/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

body:

---

| | **_NBC_ : Joe is considered the "most endangered incumbent"**
**[Pitch in $5 to make sure Joe stays in the Senate!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2653/7377f838/36265758/51fb4328/3418134334/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-mayeom?refcode=20170530nd&amount=10")** Peter,

Wow. What a month it's been. There's dysfunction in the Trump White House, Republicans rammed a terrible bill through the House that will strip health care from millions, and we still have more questions than answers about Russia's involvement in our election.

**Peter, Joe is hands down the hardest working member of the U.S. Senate, and he 's holding the line for Hoosier families. But he needs your help to stay on the job!**

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tom Perriello for Virginia
body:
Support Tom Perriello
#
Friends,
Nobody ever said that taking on the establishment and the billionaire class would be easy. We're going to win some - including a great victory by Christine Pellegrino in a New York State Legislature special election last week where she won by a landslide in a district that heavily supported Trump. And we're going to lose some - including Rob Quist's defeat in the Montana congressional special election where Rob ran 14 points ahead of Hillary Clinton in a very conservative state, but still lost.
There is no question, however, that the political momentum is with us. All across the country people are becoming increasingly involved, and Trump's support is in decline.
In Virginia, there will be a very important Democratic gubernatorial primary on June 13th. Tom Perriello is taking on the Virginia political establishment, and his grassroots campaign has made real progress. He started out as an underdog but, because of his progressive agenda and incredibly hard work, the last public poll had him slightly ahead. Tom will win this election if the turnout is high, and if he has the resources to put together a strong get-out-the-vote effort. [**Please join me in supporting Tom's campaign with a $27 contribution.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d43/43f17890/d77041bb/62038f35/1620604933/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-perriello?refcode=em170530-full")
Tom's candidacy is about improving the quality of life for working people, students, people of color, women, kids, seniors and those that government often ignores. He has pledged to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour, make community college free, and opposes the construction of fossil fuel pipelines.
He is also tackling racism at the institutional level. The school-to-prison pipeline funnels children, disproportionately children of color, down a path devoid of the hope and opportunity that we must nurture within every child, in every school, and in every home. Tom wants to end this system that sees the state spend millions of dollars locking people up when we could provide real education opportunities instead at a lower cost. Additionally, his guarantee for paid family leave and affordable child care will give young families across Virginia the break they sorely need.
In Virginia there are virtually no campaign finance restrictions, and Tom is the only gubernatorial candidate rejecting corporate contributions from the state's largest utility - an entity that has dominated politics there for years. Despite the strength of his campaign, Tom has been outspent by the establishment candidate who is flooding the state with TV commercials.
[**Please join me in supporting Tom Perriello with a $27 contribution.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d43/43f17890/d77041bb/62038f35/1620604933/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-perriello?refcode=em170530-full") We need a governor like Tom who will fight for the progressive values that we support. A progressive victory in the governor's race in a conservative state like Virginia will be a shot heard around the country, and help us expand the national momentum we already have.
The gubernatorial election in Virginia is an opportunity to put our stamp on 2017. The election is in just two weeks, and will be one of the most-watched in the entire country.
Will you join me in this fight?
[**Please make a $27 contribution to Tom Perriello 's progressive campaign for Virginia Governor today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d43/43f17890/d77041bb/62038f35/1620604933/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-perriello?refcode=em170530-full")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: I'm with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Last week reminded us again why we must start working right now to take back our country.

During my time in Congress I've seen budgets presented by both Democratic and Republican presidents. While I have disagreed with a number of them, I've never seen a proposal that violates every sense of common decency like the Trump budget.

_This budget is an assault on our values and our future. It rips apart the social safety net and slashes critical investments in almost every area (except the military) while lavishing huge tax breaks on the top 1%._

You can count on me to do everything I can to block it - and to work overtime to secure our future by helping Democrats win big in the 2018 elections.

As the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), I am focused on making sure our Democratic Senate candidates - both incumbents and challengers - are as strong as they can be. That's why I established a 2018 Victory Fund that I will use to support our candidates.

[**Right now we need 500 more grassroots donors to our Victory Fund to show that Democrats are ready to take this fight - America's fight **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bf2/70cdc2ba/475a3efc/397ced8/689045363/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-may17?refcode=em053017_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Right+now+we+need+500+more+grassroots+do&utm_campaign=em053017_1&source=em053017_1")-[**all the way to November 6, 2018. Can I count on you to make a donation of $7 or more today?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bf2/70cdc2ba/475a3efc/397ced9/689045363/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-may17?refcode=em053017_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+all+the+way+to+November+6+2018+Can+I+cou&utm_campaign=em053017_1&source=em053017_1")

In the coming weeks and months we will fight this budget, the Trumpcare plan, the reversal on climate change, the efforts to block the Russia investigation - and every piece of Trump's reckless agenda. But the ONLY way we can defend our American values is to fill Congress --the Senate and House -- with leaders who will protect our democracy, not undermine it, and put the priorities of hardworking families first--not wealthy special interests.

Tomorrow is our first finance deadline since Trump released his horrendous budget. [**Help us stand strong against this challenge and send a united, clear message that we aren 't backing down.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bf2/70cdc2ba/475a3efc/397ced6/689045363/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-may17?refcode=em053017_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Help+us+stand+strong+against+this+challe&utm_campaign=em053017_1&source=em053017_1")

Thank you for being part of this.

Chris

| **_Why I'm a New Hampshire Republican_** |
[](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyAIFNmz-2BSCD7X0Xpy-2BMqeKweWAlMSPMQ6hsTW2x3lcekWhmWv1oVImwKY9rHdIqrSg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MrJ4XlvwYw3En07E7DU7K8WautCBXdkl-2BHUbkHvSo8p4v2nLuo2s1My0s41Gh3JARV-2F7Ds5SBJfB5JsflRJUhfv2Bx2oOmTvI18JjJ6gBsyKpaqyVoDCDrtJ4MFDHlWqrCwe1dXfr-2BwHhtJ66VMssyxyO-2BG4eguxrQB-2FgRXdIxzEs4pkv3xVUF74oRmq6tTxpYg4gfkWtdxN2WiuhE0E26oCIgpQsm2bgBPBUS0fnEvqwe01Hb28DUiI0Xf8AhDBKCQjqEzYIi9zPAU7UHIJvCw-3D-3D) Click to watch our new video!
---
---
| Derek,
The New Hampshire Republican Party is the Party of the people.
We wanted to share that with you by releasing [ _**our new video**_](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyAIFNmz-2BSCD7X0Xpy-2BMqeKweWAlMSPMQ6hsTW2x3lcekWhmWv1oVImwKY9rHdIqrSg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MrJ4XlvwYw3En07E7DU7K8WautCBXdkl-2BHUbkHvSo8p4v2nLuo2s1My0s41Gh3JARV-2F7Ds5SBJfB5JsflRJUhfvNSAevnlLd3ZNwJYeh7qjUJGja-2FwSFo96bsSgCcQNqIAHh4zQmmBxZ50F0fEhTIAshNvgQvXxN1iU-2B4r1V88xQ2OMr-2BtISOByMCfIkrd0dHialOVlfh-2FrDE845xO3zm4-2B8-2FmzvJj-2Bq8eksmmoeYEE4opOJqWB-2BHwSC8sLKk0JWsIJ-2BCYJDEX34MHAr-2BMC7lsQ-3D-3D). New Hampshire Republicans are passionate and care deeply on the issues that make our State great.
This video is the first of many that will showcase why we are the Party that wants to see people succeed and that our principles matter. We are working to make sure that we control our own narrative so _nobody else can!_
_Here in the Granite State, Republicans are positive, energized, and ready to hit the ground running_ to make sure we **maintain and grow our majorities** in Concord and **win back the Congressional seats** so that New Hampshire Republicans have a voice in Washington.

Every time the Trump administration has acted, we--the American people--have been there to stand up for our values.
